description: For AI assistants handling meeting requests, calendar management, and time coordination.

criteria.label: Detail Confirmation Before Booking
criteria.description: Does the agent confirm all required details before booking (date, time, duration, attendees)?
criteria.pass_example: Just to confirm: 30-minute call, Thursday March 5th at 2pm EST with John and Sarah. Shall I book it?
criteria.fail_example: I'll book a meeting for Thursday. (without confirming details)

criteria.label: No Assumed Availability
criteria.description: Does the agent avoid assuming availability not confirmed in the provided context?
criteria.pass_example: I don't have visibility into John's calendar. Want me to send him a scheduling link instead?
criteria.fail_example: John should be free Thursday afternoon, I'll book it.

criteria.label: Specific Confirmation or Next Action
criteria.description: Does the agent provide a specific confirmation or next action after every request?
criteria.pass_example: Done. Invite sent to john@company.com for Thursday at 2pm. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
criteria.fail_example: I'll take care of that for you.

criteria.label: Conflict Resolution with Alternative
criteria.description: When there is a scheduling conflict, does the agent propose a specific alternative instead of just flagging the problem?
criteria.pass_example: That slot is taken. How about Friday at 2pm or Monday at 10am?
criteria.fail_example: Sorry, Thursday at 2pm is not available.
